Class sbktech.tools.hashjava.util.Matcher 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----sbktech.tools.hashjava.util.Matcher
public class Matcher
extends Object
Simple backtracking matcher, understands wild chars "*" and "?" only

Matcher()

compile(String)
Create a new Matcher from a pattern.
match(String)
See if this string matches the current matcher
nextMatch(String, int)

Matcher 
  public Matcher()

nextMatch 
  protected final boolean nextMatch(String s,
                                    int fromWhere)
match 
  public boolean match(String s)
See if this string matches the current matcher
compile 
  public static synchronized Matcher compile(String pat)
Create a new Matcher from a pattern. The only special characters are * and ?, and they have their usual meanings. This is the only way to create new instances of a Matcher.
